def negative_generic_manager_or_processor_class_controls_many_unrelated_modes():
    rule_id = "generic_manager_or_processor_class_controls_many_unrelated_modes"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag vague manager-style classes that centralize unrelated behaviors behind mode flags."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
